title: Job restart failed: checkpoint file missing (scratch purge)
summary: Job 925000 (alice, md_restart_run) failed 1 minute after start with exit code 1. The job script referenced checkpoint file /scratch/alice/md_run/checkpoint.dat, which was deleted by the 30-day scratch auto-purge on 2026-03-15. User must restart from the last available checkpoint or restart from scratch.

timeline.event: Original job ran and wrote checkpoint

notes: User should check if checkpoint exists in long-term storage before restarting from scratch.
